mapper.select: SELECT id, biz, biz_key AS bizKey, exchange, routing_key AS routingKey, payload_type AS payloadType, payload, status, try_count AS tryCount, next_retry_at AS nextRetryAt, last_error AS lastError, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM outbox_message WHERE status IN (0, 3) AND (next_retry_at IS NULL OR next_retry_at <= #{now}) ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
